Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: These first three events seem like idle/standby state: low temp, ambient pressure, no vibration, no flow, tool at 0, low energy (~0.4-0.5).

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 4: Temp 50, Pressure 1, Vibration 30, Flow 5, Tool 5, Energy 2.00. Sudden spike: temp rises, vibration starts, flow of material (5 units/s), tool moves to 5 mm, energy increases. This could be Cutting Metal or some machining operation.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 5: Temp 55, Pressure 1.5, Vibration 35, Flow 5, Tool 7, Energy 2.50. Continuing similar trend. Event 6: Temp 58, Pressure 1.5, Vibration 38, Flow 5, Tool 10, Energy 3.00.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 7: Temp 40, Pressure 2, Vibration 10, Flow 2, Tool 15, Energy 2.00. temperature dropped (from 58 to 40), pressure increased to 2, vibration dropped to 10, flow decreased to 2, tool at 15. Event 8: same.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 9: Temp 80, Pressure 2, Vibration 50, Flow 0, Tool 15, Energy 5.00. Sharp increase: temp 80, vibration 50, flow drops to 0, tool still at 15.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Event 10: Temp 30, Pressure 1, Vibration 1, Flow 0, Tool 15, Energy 1.00. Rapid cooldown?

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 11-12: Temp 25, Pressure 1, Vibration 5, Flow 1, Tool 20, Energy 1.5-1.6.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Events 13-15: back to initial state: Temp 20-21, Pressure 1, Vibration 0, Flow 0, Tool 0, Energy 0.5-0.4.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 1. Idle/Standby: Events 1-3 (and 13-15). 2. Activity A (Cutting Metal?): Events 4,5,6. 3. Activity B (Assembling/Pressing?): Events 7-8. 4. Activity C (Welding?): Event 9. 5. Activity D (Cooling/Inspection?): Event 10. 6. Activity E (Packaging/Ejection?): Events 11-12.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Cutting Metal: Often involves a cutting tool that moves, generates heat and vibration, chips/coolant flow could be material flow. Assembling Parts: moderate conditions, pressing force which might be pressure. Welding: high heat, no material flow. Quality Inspection: post-weld inspection. Packaging: moving parts, low temp, flow.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So activities: Idle (events 1-3, 13-15), Cutting Metal (events 4-6), Assembling Parts (events 7-8), Welding (event 9), Cooling / Quality Inspection (event 10), Packaging (events 11-12).
